title: Apply for funding under the Foreign Credential Recognition Program - Innovation and skilled newcomer employment: After you've applied - Canada.ca
content:
## Apply for funding under the Foreign Credential Recognition Program - Innovation and skilled newcomer employment: After you've applied
From: Employment and Social Development Canada
- 3. How to complete your application
- 5. After you've applied

## 5. After you've applied
After you've applied, you will receive an acknowledgment of  receipt of your application.
- If you submit your application by email, you  will receive an automatic email acknowledgment to the email address that was  used to submit the application.
- If you submit your application by mail, you will  receive an acknowledgment by email within 21 days of its receipt. The  acknowledgment will be sent to the email address that is provided in your  application.
If your application is retained, you will be invited to  submit a full project proposal. At that time, you will be required to provide  additional information about your proposed project.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
